bug.description: blocking RTOS API called from interrupt context causing undefined behavior

prompt:
There is a blocking RTOS API called from interrupt context causing undefined behavior downstream of function snmp_oid_to_ip4 in the connectivity/lwipstack/lwip subsystem.
The function is located at connectivity/lwipstack/lwip/src/apps/snmp/lwip_snmp_core.c:285.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
